---
name: New Species
about: Contribute a new species/breed to AI Ranch
title: '[SPECIES] '
labels: new-species, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🧬 Species Overview

**Species Name**: [e.g., cattle, duck, custom-name]
**Species Type**: [e.g., reasoning, network, monitoring]

## 📝 Description

A clear description of what this species does and its purpose in the Ranch.

## 🧬 Breed.md Content

```markdown
# species
[species-name]

# name
[Display Name]

# description
[Detailed description of what this species does]

# capabilities
- capability_1 (weight: 1.0)
- capability_2 (weight: 0.9)
- capability_3 (weight: 0.7)

# personality
tone: professional
verbosity: normal
creativity: 0.5
risk_tolerance: 0.3

# model
base_model: phi-3-mini
temperature: 0.7
max_tokens: 1024

# evolution
mutation_rate: 0.1
crossover_rate: 0.7
selection_pressure: 0.3
elite_count: 2

# constraints
- required: [what must the species always do]
- forbidden: [what the species must never do]
- preferred: [preferred behaviors]
```

## 🎯 Use Cases

1. **Use Case 1**: Description...
2. **Use Case 2**: Description...

## ✅ Testing Checklist

- [ ] Tested with at least 5 different inputs
- [ ] Verified routing keywords are appropriate
- [ ] Confirmed personality settings produce expected behavior
- [ ] Validated breed.md syntax

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] Updated templates/README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] Added to species list in main README.md

---

**Note**: Every contribution makes the Ranch smarter — without making it bigger!
